---
title: "The Gazetteer"
pdf: false
listing:
  id: gazetteer
  contents:
    - "articles/*/*.qmd"
    - "exemplars/*.qmd"
  template: ../theme/gazetteer.ejs
  filter-ui: false
  sort-ui: false
  sort: false
  page-size: 400
---

::: {.fg-gazetteer-intro}
A faceted, searchable index of every entry in the guide: the articles by family
alongside the exemplars from the gazetteer of worked examples. Type a name in
the search box, or pick from the filters below.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="fg-gaz-controls">
  <input id="fg-search" class="fg-search" type="search" placeholder="Search entries by name…" aria-label="Search entries">
  <div id="fg-gaz-count" class="fg-gaz-count"></div>
</div>
<div class="fg-facets">
  <div class="fg-facet-group"><span class="fg-facet-label">Family</span><div id="fg-facet-family" class="fg-chips"></div></div>
  <div class="fg-facet-group"><span class="fg-facet-label">Medium</span><div id="fg-facet-media" class="fg-chips"></div></div>
  <div class="fg-facet-group"><span class="fg-facet-label">Genre</span><div id="fg-facet-genre" class="fg-chips"></div></div>
</div>
<p id="fg-gaz-empty" class="fg-gaz-empty" style="display:none">No entries match those filters.</p>
```

::: {#gazetteer}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  function ready(fn){ document.readyState!=='loading' ? fn() : document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', fn); }
  ready(function () {
    var grid = document.querySelector('.fg-gaz-grid');
    if (!grid) return;
    var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(grid.querySelectorAll('.fg-card'));
    var FAM = [['structure','Structure & Pacing'],['puzzles','Puzzles, Clues & Information'],['story','Story, Character & Voice'],['players','Players & Social Dynamics'],['space','Space, Props & Materiality'],['systems','Systems & Mechanics']];
    var MEDIA = [['interactive-fiction','Interactive Fiction'],['live-game','Live Game'],['tabletop','Tabletop'],['puzzle-hunt','Puzzle-hunt']];
    var sel = { family:new Set(), media:new Set(), genre:new Set() }, search='';

    function countBy(attr){ var m={}; cards.forEach(function(c){ (c.dataset[attr]||'').split(' ').forEach(function(k){ if(k) m[k]=(m[k]||0)+1; }); }); return m; }
    var counts = { family:countBy('family'), media:countBy('media'), genre:countBy('genre') };
    var GENRE = Object.keys(counts.genre).sort().map(function(g){ return [g, g.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+g.slice(1).replace(/-/g,' ')]; });

    function chip(group, key, label){
      var b=document.createElement('button');
      b.className='fg-chip'; b.type='button'; b.dataset.group=group; b.dataset.key=key; b.setAttribute('aria-pressed','false');
      var n=counts[group][key]||0;
      b.innerHTML=label+' <span class="fg-chip-n">'+n+'</span>';
      b.addEventListener('click', function(){
        var s=sel[group];
        if(s.has(key)){ s.delete(key); b.classList.remove('on'); b.setAttribute('aria-pressed','false'); }
        else { s.add(key); b.classList.add('on'); b.setAttribute('aria-pressed','true'); }
        apply();
      });
      return b;
    }
    function fill(id, group, list){ var box=document.getElementById(id); if(box) list.forEach(function(p){ box.appendChild(chip(group,p[0],p[1])); }); }
    fill('fg-facet-family','family',FAM);
    fill('fg-facet-media','media',MEDIA);
    fill('fg-facet-genre','genre',GENRE);

    var countEl=document.getElementById('fg-gaz-count'), emptyEl=document.getElementById('fg-gaz-empty');
    function hit(c){
      if(search && (c.dataset.title||'').indexOf(search)<0) return false;
      if(sel.family.size && !sel.family.has(c.dataset.family)) return false;
      if(sel.media.size && !(c.dataset.media||'').split(' ').some(function(x){return sel.media.has(x);})) return false;
      if(sel.genre.size && !(c.dataset.genre||'').split(' ').some(function(x){return sel.genre.has(x);})) return false;
      return true;
    }
    function apply(){
      var n=0;
      cards.forEach(function(c){ var ok=hit(c); c.style.display=ok?'':'none'; if(ok)n++; });
      if(countEl) countEl.textContent=n+' of '+cards.length+' entries';
      if(emptyEl) emptyEl.style.display=n?'none':'';
    }
    var si=document.getElementById('fg-search');
    if(si) si.addEventListener('input', function(){ search=si.value.toLowerCase().trim(); apply(); });
    apply();
  });
})();
</script>
```
